messages.content: Rio DVD AU Released date

The exact release date for the Rio DVD in Australia is not provided. However, Rio was released in theatres in Australia on April 7, 2011. Typically, the DVD is released a few months after the theatrical release, so it would likely be available on DVD in Australia later that year or early the following year.
Frozen Blu-Ray USA Released date
Frozen was released on Blu-Ray in the USA on March 18, 2014.
Rio Blu-Ray USA Released date
Rio was released on Blu-Ray in the USA on August 2, 2011.
Rio 2 Blu-Ray USA Released date
Rio 2 was released on Blu-Ray in the USA on July 15, 2014.
The Lion King Blu-Ray USA Released date
The Lion King was released on Blu-Ray in the USA on October 4, 2011.
The Lion King VHS USA Released date
The Lion King was released on VHS in the USA on March 3, 1995.
Flushed Away VHS USA Released date
Flushed Away was released on VHS in the USA on February 20, 2007.
Rio VHS USA Released date
Rio was not released on VHS in the USA. The film was released in theaters in April 2011, after the VHS format had been largely phased out.
Rio Blu-Ray UK Released date
Rio was released on Blu-Ray in the UK on August 8, 2011.
Rio Blu-Ray AU Released date
Rio was released on Blu-Ray in Australia on August 3, 2011.
Rio was released on Blu-Ray in United Kingdom on
Apologies for the confusion. The correct release date for Rio on Blu-Ray in the United Kingdom is August 15, 2011.
